steps.title: Identify the favorable outcomes from the table
steps.content: The question asks for the probability that a member is at least 45 years old. From the table, the row labeled At least 45 years old shows a total of 107 members. The overall total number of members is 135.

steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content: Probability = $$\frac{\text{favorable outcomes}}{\text{total outcomes}} = \frac{107}{135}$$. That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
